title: koeleria spicata subsp. kinabaluensis
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. kinabaluensis is a subspecies of the Koeleria spicata species, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Koeleria spicata subsp. kinabaluensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Koeleria spicata subsp. kinabaluensis can be made by drying and processing the plant material, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
